name: PLS Check Cashers
description_short: Cicero, IL's PLS Check Cashers at 5947 W Roosevelt Rd offers 24-hour check cashing and financial services.
description_long:
PLS Check Cashers at 5947 W Roosevelt Rd in Cicero, IL is a standalone check-cashing facility operating 24/7 to serve the Cicero community. Located on Roosevelt Road, a busy commercial thoroughfare, this location is easy to reach whether you're a local resident or driving through the area. The 24-hour schedule means you can access check cashing services at any time of day or night, making it ideal for shift workers and anyone needing immediate financial transactions.

This Cicero location offers standard check-cashing services for personal and payroll checks, as well as other financial services common to check-cashing stores. For specific details about current services, accepted check types, or fees, contact the store directly at +1 708-656-8585. The staff can answer questions about identification requirements and help you understand the services available at this particular location.

Residents and workers throughout Cicero depend on this Roosevelt Rd location for quick, accessible check cashing when traditional banking options aren't available or convenient. Bring a valid government-issued ID and the check you want to cash. PLS Check Cashers provides a straightforward alternative to bank branches for time-sensitive financial needs.
pros: Open 24/7 — all services available around the clock, including weekends and holidays
Vehicle registration, title transfers, and license plate services available on-site (Illinois locations)
Ria Money Transfer integration for international remittances to a wide global network
Xpectations! PLUS Debit Mastercard provides a prepaid banking alternative for unbanked customers
Foreign currency exchange available alongside standard money services
Notary services on-site for legal documents including wills, deeds, and power of attorney
Operates in 12 states with a consistent service menu across locations
cons: Check cashing fees are not disclosed on the website — customers cannot compare costs before visiting
No loan or credit products offered; does not address borrowing needs
Repeated use for paycheck cashing is materially more expensive than maintaining a bank account
No FDIC insurance or interest-bearing accounts — not a substitute for banking
best_for: Unbanked or underbanked consumers who need immediate cash from checks
Illinois residents who need vehicle registration or title transfer services outside DMV hours
Immigrants or workers sending money internationally via Ria Money Transfer
Anyone needing after-hours financial services, bill payment, or notarization
diagnosis: PLS is best suited for unbanked consumers who need immediate check-to-cash conversion, international money transfers, or Illinois vehicle services outside normal business hours — all available 24/7 at a single location. The main caveat is cost: check cashing fees are not published, and frequent use for payroll deposits will erode significantly more income than a basic bank account would.
meta_description: PLS Check Cashers at 5947 W Roosevelt Rd, Cicero, IL. Open 24 hours for quick check cashing.
